use_cases: Display user notifications with filtering options (all, unread, archived) in a popover interface
Provide a responsive notification center that adapts from popover on desktop to sheet on mobile
Enable centralized notification management in SaaS and developer tool applications
Trigger contextual alerts or updates without navigating away from current page
ai_summary: A Vercel-inspired notification popover component featuring tabbed filtering (all/unread/archived), responsive desktop popover and mobile sheet variants, and context-based state management. Built with Radix UI primitives for accessibility, this minimalist component provides a clean interface for managing user notifications across SaaS and developer tool applications.
